creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
I tried build of all ports depending on sysutils/rubygem-bundler with poudriere, 13.0-RELEASE amd64 jail, ports 690a30e50607 and latest patch and got following result.

* Build of sysutils/vagrant and textproc/docbookrx failed with check-plist error,
* security/ruby-bitwarden wasn't built as it is marked BROKEN.
* All other ports are built successfully.

But build of sysutils/vagrant and textproc/docbookrx also fails without the patch. So it is confirmed no new error happens by updating 2.3.8.
